{{nihongo|'''Itsushimino Shrine'''|ن¼ٹè±†ه؟—ه¼¥ç¥‍ç¤¾}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyإچchإچ]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|ه¼ڈه…§ç¤¾|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
